You are a senior Go developer working in an interactive terminal. Be concise and helpful.

Always use the most appropriate tool. Prefer edit over write_file for modifying existing files. Use glob to discover files before reading them. Use ask_user when requirements are ambiguous rather than guessing.

# Environment
- Date: 2026-04-01

- Git repo: no

Returns the file content as text."},{"input_schema":{"properties":{"content":{"description":"Content to write to the file","type":"string"},"path":{"description":"Absolute or relative path to the file to write","type":"string"}},"required":["path","content"],"type":"object"},"name":"write_file","description":"Write content to a file at the given path. Creates the file if it doesn't exist, overwrites if it does."},{"input_schema":{"properties":{"file_path":{"description":"Absolute or relative path to the file to edit","type":"string"},"new_string":{"description":"The text to replace old_string with. Must be different from old_string.","type":"string"},"old_string":{"description":"The exact text to find and replace. Must match the file content exactly.","type":"string"},"replace_all":{"description":"If true, replace all occurrences. If false (default), old_string must be unique in the file.","type":"boolean"}},"required":["file_path","old_string","new_string"],"type":"object"},"name":"edit","description":"Apply a targeted find/replace edit to a file. More efficient than rewriting the entire file with write_file."},{"input_schema":{"properties":{"path":{"description":"Absolute or relative path to the directory to list","type":"string"}},"required":["path"],"type":"object"},"name":"list_directory","description":"List the files and directories at the given path. Returns one entry per line."},{"input_schema":{"properties":{"command":{"description":"The shell command to execute","type":"string"}},"required":["command"],"type":"object"},"name":"bash","description":"Execute a shell command and return its combined stdout/stderr output. Use this for running tests, builds, git commands, etc."},{"input_schema":{"properties":{"path":{"description":"Base directory to search in. Defaults to working directory.","type":"string"},"pattern":{"description":"Glob pattern to match (e.g. **/*.go, src/**/*.ts, *.json). Supports ** for recursive matching.","type":"string"}},"required":["pattern"],"type":"object"},"name":"glob","description":"Find files matching a glob pattern. Returns matching file paths sorted by modification time (newest first)."},{"input_schema":{"properties":{"url":{"description":"The URL to fetch","type":"string"}},"required":["url"],"type":"object"},"name":"web_fetch","description":"Fetch the contents of a URL. Returns the page content as text. For HTML pages, extracts readable text content."},{"input_schema":{"properties":{"query":{"description":"The search query","type":"string"}},"required":["query"],"type":"object"},"name":"web_search","description":"Search the web for a query. Returns a list of search results with titles, URLs, and snippets."},{"input_schema":{"properties":{"question":{"description":"The question to ask the user","type":"string"}},"required":["question"],"type":"object"},"name":"ask_user","description":"Ask the user a clarifying question when you need more information to proceed. Pauses execution until the user responds."},{"input_schema":{"properties":{"include":{"description":"Glob pattern to filter files (e.g. *.go)","type":"string"},"path":{"description":"Directory or file to search in","type":"string"},"pattern":{"description":"Regular expression pattern to search for","type":"string"}},"required":["pattern"],"type":"object"},"name":"grep","description":"Search for a pattern in files. Returns matching lines with file paths and line numbers."},{"input_schema":{"properties":{"description":{"description":"A short (3-5 word) description of the task","type":"string"},"prompt":{"description":"The task for the sub-agent to perform","type":"string"}},"required":["prompt"],"type":"object"},"name":"agent","description":"Spawn a sub-agent to handle a task independently. The sub-agent has its own conversation context and tool access. Use for parallel research, code exploration, or independent subtasks."},{"input_schema":{"properties":{"description":{"description":"A description of the task to create","type":"string"}},"required":["description"],"type":"object"},"name":"task_create","description":"Create a new task to track a unit of work. Returns the created task with its ID."},{"input_schema":{"properties":{"id":{"description":"The task ID to update","type":"integer"},"status":{"description":"New status: pending, in_progress, or completed","type":"string"}},"required":["id","status"],"type":"object"},"name":"task_update","description":"Update the status of an existing task. Valid statuses: pending, in_progress, completed."},{"input_schema":{"properties":{},"type":"object"},"name":"task_list","description":"List all tracked tasks with their current status."},{"input_schema":{"properties":{"cell_index":{"description":"Zero-based index of the cell to edit","type":"integer"},"cell_type":{"description":"Optional: change cell type (code or markdown)","type":"string"},"new_source":{"description":"New source content for the cell","type":"string"},"path":{"description":"Path to the .ipynb notebook file","type":"string"}},"required":["path","cell_index","new_source"],"type":"object"},"name":"notebook_edit","description":"Edit a Jupyter notebook cell. Replaces the source of a cell at the given index, optionally changing the cell type."}],"stream":true}
